title: dorycnium crantzii
intro: Dorycnium crantzii, also known as the upright tickleweed or Crantz's tickleweed, is a perennial plant species in the pea family (Fabaceae). Traditionally, this plant is used for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dorycnium crantzii include relief from menstrual cramps, sore throats, and other conditions where inflammation is a factor. Dorycnium crantzii can be prepared as an infusion or decoction, and is often used in herbal medicine to create teas, tinctures, and salves.
